note_text: Wound note - Rightlowerle. Meas 6.2x3.0x0.4cm. Heavy serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 69% gran, 31% slough. Periwound intact. Collagen dsg changed. Pt c/o discomfort w/ dsg change. Dr. Oduya notified.
